ScriptReference.name: Init List item Rich Text Editor

Comment.value: Each time the Web viewer needs to be refreshed
Called from View Card List item when a user click an item in a List
Caller can be "Title List" or "Page item List"

Calculation.Text: /* HTML Parameters */ Let ( [ i = 1; trans = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage ; " TRANS" ; "" ); localisation_mode = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage; "translate"; "original"); localisation_code = $$localisation_code; LTjson1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; List template::Text Label 1; JSONString]; ["id" ; "1" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case(List template::Text 1 HTML format= ""; False; True) ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; 10000 ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI 1" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTjson2 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; List template::Text Label 2 ; JSONString]; ["id" ; "2" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case(List template::Text 2 HTML format=""; False; True) ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; 10000 ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI 2" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTjson3 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; List template::Text Label 3 ; JSONString]; ["id" ; "3" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case(List template::Text 3 HTML format = ""; False; True) ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; 10000 ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI 3" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTtextArr = "[" & Case ( List template::Number of text fields = 1; LTjson1; List template::Number of text fields = 2; LTjson1 & "," & LTjson2; List template::Number of text fields = 3; LTjson1 & "," & LTjson2 & "," & LTjson3) & "]"; LTjsonResult = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["environment" ; Case ( Platform="WebDirect"; "web"; "FileMaker") ; JSONString]; ["record-id" ; Get(recordID) ; JSONNumber]; ["localisation_mode" ; localisation_mode; JSONString]; ["edit_mode" ; "titleListItem"; JSONString]; ["localisation_code" ; localisation_code ; JSONString]; ["texts" ; LTtextArr ; JSONArray] ) ]; JSONFormatElements ( LTjsonResult) //LTjsonResult )

Comment.value: Some old productions does not have a list based on a template

Calculation.Text: /* HTML Parameters */ Let ( [ i = 1; trans = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage ; " TRANS" ; "" ); localisation_mode = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage; "translate"; "original"); localisation_code = $$localisation_code; LTjson1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 1; JSONString]; ["id" ; "1" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; False ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; FAT Block @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI PI 1" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTjson2 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 2 ; JSONString]; ["id" ; "2" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; False ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; FAT Block @ Page item::List Text 2 max characters ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI PI 2" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTjson3 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 3 ; JSONString]; ["id" ; "3" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; False; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; FAT Block @ Page item::List Text 3 max characters ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI PI 3" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTtextArr = "[" & Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields = 1; LTjson1; FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields = 2; LTjson1 & "," & LTjson2; FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields = 3; LTjson1 & "," & LTjson2 & "," & LTjson3) & "]"; LTjsonResult = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["environment" ; Case ( Platform="WebDirect"; "web"; "FileMaker") ; JSONString]; ["record-id" ; Get(recordID) ; JSONNumber]; ["localisation_mode" ; localisation_mode; JSONString]; ["edit_mode" ; "pageItemListItem"; JSONString]; ["localisation_code" ; localisation_code ; JSONString]; ["texts" ; LTtextArr ; JSONArray] ) ]; JSONFormatElements ( LTjsonResult) //LTjsonResult )

/* HTML Parameters */ Let ( [ i = 1; trans = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage ; " TRANS" ; "" ); localisation_mode = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage; "translate"; "original"); localisation_code = $$localisation_code; LTjson1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; List template @ Page item::Text Label 1; JSONString]; ["id" ; "1" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case(List template @ Page item::Text 1 HTML format= ""; False; True) ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; FAT Block @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI PI 1" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTjson2 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; List template @ Page item::Text Label 2 ; JSONString]; ["id" ; "2" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case(List template @ Page item::Text 2 HTML format=""; False; True) ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; FAT Block @ Page item::List Text 2 max characters ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI PI 2" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTjson3 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["label" ; List template @ Page item::Text Label 3 ; JSONString]; ["id" ; "3" ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case(List template @ Page item::Text 3 HTML format = ""; False; True) ; JSONBoolean]; ["maxchars" ; FAT Block @ Page item::List Text 3 max characters ; JSONNumber]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML ( GetField("TF LI PI 3" & trans & "::Text") ) ; JSONString] ); LTtextArr = "[" & Case ( FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields = 1; LTjson1; FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields = 2; LTjson1 & "," & LTjson2; FAT Block @ Page item::List number of textfields = 3; LTjson1 & "," & LTjson2 & "," & LTjson3) & "]"; LTjsonResult = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["environment" ; Case ( Platform="WebDirect"; "web"; "FileMaker") ; JSONString]; ["record-id" ; Get(recordID) ; JSONNumber]; ["localisation_mode" ; localisation_mode; JSONString]; ["edit_mode" ; "pageItemListItem"; JSONString]; ["localisation_code" ; localisation_code ; JSONString]; ["texts" ; LTtextArr ; JSONArray] ) ]; JSONFormatElements ( LTjsonResult) //LTjsonResult )
